message: test: add protocol, tailscale, and graphql goldens

files.patch:
@@ -29,31 +29,50 @@ jobs:
   build:
     name: Build ${{ matrix.target }}
     runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
-    timeout-minutes: 45
+    timeout-minutes: 60
     strategy:
       fail-fast: false
       matrix:
+        # `binary` is the cargo bin name; `bin_file` is the on-disk
+        # filename that goes into the tarball/zip (Windows adds .exe).
+        # We ship both `fwc` (the agent-facing CLI) and `fcp-host`
+        # (the Gateway/Orchestrator that README's Quick Start tells
+        # users to run as `fwc --host http://127.0.0.1:8787`). Both
+        # share the workspace's dependency graph, so building them
+        # back-to-back inside one matrix leg is much cheaper than a
+        # parallel matrix that would re-fetch and re-compile every
+        # workspace dep twice.
         include:
           - os: ubuntu-latest
             target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
-            artifact: fwc
-            asset: fwc-linux-amd64
+            asset_suffix: linux-amd64
+            ext: ""
+            archive_ext: tar.xz
           - os: ubuntu-24.04-arm
             target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
-            artifact: fwc
-            asset: fwc-linux-arm64
+            asset_suffix: linux-arm64
+            ext: ""
+            archive_ext: tar.xz
           - os: macos-14
             target: aarch64-apple-darwin
-            artifact: fwc
-            asset: fwc-darwin-arm64
+            asset_suffix: darwin-arm64
+            ext: ""
+            archive_ext: tar.xz
           - os: macos-14
             target: x86_64-apple-darwin
-            artifact: fwc
-            asset: fwc-darwin-amd64
+            asset_suffix: darwin-amd64
+            ext: ""
+            archive_ext: tar.xz
           - os: windows-latest
             target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
-            artifact: fwc.exe
-            asset: fwc-windows-amd64
+            asset_suffix: windows-amd64
+            ext: ".exe"
+            archive_ext: zip
+          - os: windows-11-arm
+            target: aarch64-pc-windows-msvc
+            asset_suffix: windows-arm64
+            ext: ".exe"
+            archive_ext: zip
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
       - name: Checkout external dependencies
@@ -73,31 +92,41 @@ jobs:
         with:
           key: release-${{ matrix.target }}
 
-      - name: Build release binary
-        run: cargo build --release --package fwc --target ${{ matrix.target }}
+      - name: Build release binaries (fwc + fcp-host)
+        run: |
+          cargo build --release --package fwc --target ${{ matrix.target }}
+          cargo build --release --package fcp-host --bin fcp-host --target ${{ matrix.target }}
 
-      - name: Create tarball (Unix)
+      - name: Package binaries (Unix)
         if: runner.os != 'Windows'
         run: |
           mkdir -p dist
           cd target/${{ matrix.target }}/release
-          tar -cJf ../../../dist/${{ matrix.asset }}.tar.xz ${{ matrix.artifact }}
+          for binary in fwc fcp-host; do
+            asset="${binary}-${{ matrix.asset_suffix }}.${{ matrix.archive_ext }}"
+            tar -cJf "../../../dist/${asset}" "${binary}"
+          done
           cd ../../../dist
-          shasum -a 256 "${{ matrix.asset }}.tar.xz" > "${{ matrix.asset }}.tar.xz.sha256"
+          for f in *.${{ matrix.archive_ext }}; do
+            shasum -a 256 "$f" > "$f.sha256"
+          done
 
-      - name: Create zip (Windows)
+      - name: Package binaries (Windows)
         if: runner.os == 'Windows'
         shell: pwsh
         run: |
           New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path dist
-          Compress-Archive -Path "target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/${{ matrix.artifact }}" -DestinationPath "dist/${{ matrix.asset }}.zip"
-          cd dist
-          $hash = (Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 "${{ matrix.asset }}.zip").Hash.ToLower()
-          "$hash  ${{ matrix.asset }}.zip" | Out-File -Encoding ASCII "${{ matrix.asset }}.zip.sha256"
+          foreach ($binary in @("fwc", "fcp-host")) {
+            $exe = "${binary}${{ matrix.ext }}"
+            $asset = "${binary}-${{ matrix.asset_suffix }}.${{ matrix.archive_ext }}"
+            Compress-Archive -Path "target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/$exe" -DestinationPath "dist/$asset"
+            $hash = (Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 "dist/$asset").Hash.ToLower()
+            "$hash  $asset" | Out-File -Encoding ASCII "dist/$asset.sha256"
+          }
 
       - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
-          name: ${{ matrix.asset }}
+          name: cli-and-host-${{ matrix.asset_suffix }}
           path: dist/*
 
   # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
@@ -126,6 +155,9 @@ jobs:
           - os: windows-latest
             target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
             suffix: windows-amd64
+          - os: windows-11-arm
+            target: aarch64-pc-windows-msvc
+            suffix: windows-arm64
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
       - name: Checkout external dependencies
@@ -217,6 +249,9 @@ jobs:
       - name: Generate combined checksums
         run: |
           cd dist
+          # Exclude any pre-existing SHA256SUMS.txt so re-runs don't
+          # double-count themselves; the per-asset .sha256 files are the
+          # source of truth.
           cat *.sha256 | sort > SHA256SUMS.txt
 
       - name: Install Cosign
@@ -246,13 +281,13 @@ jobs:

-            | macOS (x64) | [fwc](fwc-darwin-amd64.tar.xz) | [anthropic](fcp-anthropic-darwin-amd64.tar.xz) | [discord](fcp-discord-darwin-amd64.tar.xz) | [openai](fcp-openai-darwin-amd64.tar.xz) | [telegram](fcp-telegram-darwin-amd64.tar.xz) |
-            | Windows (x64) | [fwc](fwc-windows-amd64.zip) | [anthropic](fcp-anthropic-windows-amd64.zip) | [discord](fcp-discord-windows-amd64.zip) | [openai](fcp-openai-windows-amd64.zip) | [telegram](fcp-telegram-windows-amd64.zip) |
+            | Platform | CLI | Host | Anthropic | Discord | OpenAI | Telegram |
+            |----------|-----|------|-----------|---------|--------|----------|
+            | Linux (x64) | [fwc](fwc-linux-amd64.tar.xz) | [fcp-host](fcp-host-linux-amd64.tar.xz) | [anthropic](fcp-anthropic-linux-amd64.tar.xz) | [discord](fcp-discord-linux-amd64.tar.xz) | [openai](fcp-openai-linux-amd64.tar.xz) | [telegram](fcp-telegram-linux-amd64.tar.xz) |
+            | Linux (ARM64) | [fwc](fwc-linux-arm64.tar.xz) | [fcp-host](fcp-host-linux-arm64.tar.xz) | [anthropic](fcp-anthropic-linux-arm64.tar.xz) | [discord](fcp-discord-linux-arm64.tar.xz) | [openai](fcp-openai-linux-arm64.tar.xz) | [telegram](fcp-telegram-linux-arm64.tar.xz) |
+            | macOS (ARM64) | [fwc](fwc-darwin-arm64.tar.xz) | [fcp-host](fcp-host-darwin-arm64.tar.xz) | [anthropic](fcp-anthropic-darwin-arm64.tar.xz) | [discord](fcp-discord-darwin-arm64.tar.xz) | [openai](fcp-openai-darwin-arm64.tar.xz) | [telegram](fcp-telegram-darwin-arm64.tar.xz) |
+            | macOS (x64) | [fwc](fwc-darwin-amd64.tar.xz) | [fcp-host](fcp-host-darwin-amd64.tar.xz) | [anthropic](fcp-anthropic-darwin-amd64.tar.xz) | [discord](fcp-discord-darwin-amd64.tar.xz) | [openai](fcp-openai-darwin-amd64.tar.xz) | [telegram](fcp-telegram-darwin-amd64.tar.xz) |
+            | Windows (x64) | [fwc](fwc-windows-amd64.zip) | [fcp-host](fcp-host-windows-amd64.zip) | [anthropic](fcp-anthropic-windows-amd64.zip) | [discord](fcp-discord-windows-amd64.zip) | [openai](fcp-openai-windows-amd64.zip) | [telegram](fcp-telegram-windows-amd64.zip) |
 
             ### Verification

 [[bench]]
 name = "fcps_parsing"

@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+---
+source: crates/fcp-protocol/tests/session_golden_vectors.rs
+expression: "serde_json::json!({\n    \"hello\":\n    {\n        \"cbor_hex\": hex::encode(&hello_cbor), \"transcript_hex\":\n        hex::encode(&hello_transcript), \"shape\":\n        {\n            \"from\": \"[initiator-node-id]\", \"to\": \"[responder-node-id]\",\n            \"eph_pubkey_hex\": hello.eph_pubkey.to_hex(), \"nonce_hex\":\n            hex::encode(hello.nonce.as_bytes()), \"cookie\":\n            hello.cookie.as_ref().map(|cookie|\n            hex::encode(cookie.as_bytes())), \"timestamp\": \"[timestamp]\",\n            \"suites\":\n            hello.suites.iter().map(|suite|\n            suite.as_str()).collect::<Vec<_>>(), \"transport_limits\":\n            {\n                \"max_datagram_bytes\":\n                hello.transport_limits.as_ref().map_or(0, |limits|\n                limits.effective_max()),\n            }, \"has_signature\": hello.signature.is_some(),\n        },\n    }, \"ack\":\n    {\n        \"cbor_hex\": hex::encode(&ack_cbor), \"transcript_hex\":\n        hex::encode(&ack_transcript), \"shape\":\n        {\n            \"from\": \"[responder-node-id]\", \"to\": \"[initiator-node-id]\",\n            \"eph_pubkey_hex\": ack.eph_pubkey.to_hex(), \"nonce_hex\":\n            hex::encode(ack.nonce.as_bytes()), \"session_id\": \"[session-id]\",\n            \"suite\": ack.suite.as_str(), \"timestamp\": \"[timestamp]\",\n            \"has_signature\": ack.signature.is_some(),\n        },\n    },\n})"
+---
+{
+  "ack": {
+    "cbor_hex": "",
+    "shape": {
+      "eph_pubkey_hex": "ff2ee45601ec1b67310c7790404585ae697331eee1c1f8cf2419731c1fff3e6b",
+      "from": "[responder-node-id]",
+      "has_signature": true,
+      "nonce_hex": "77777777777777777777777777777777",
+      "session_id": "[session-id]",
+      "suite": "suite1-hmacsha256",
+      "timestamp": "[timestamp]",
+      "to": "[initiator-node-id]"
+    },
+    "transcript_hex": ""
+  },
+  "hello": {
+    "cbor_hex": "",
+    "shape": {
+      "cookie": null,
+      "eph_pubkey_hex": "7b0d47d93427f8311160781c7c733fd89f88970aef490d8aa0ee19a4cb8a1b14",
+      "from": "[initiator-node-id]",
+      "has_signature": true,
+      "nonce_hex": "66666666666666666666666666666666",
+      "suites": [
+        "suite1-hmacsha256",
+        "suite2-blake3"
+      ],
+      "timestamp": "[timestamp]",
+      "to": "[responder-node-id]",
+      "transport_limits": {
+        "max_datagram_bytes": 1200
+      }
+    },
+    "transcript_hex": "464350322d48454c4c4f2d56316e6e6f64652d696e69746961746f726e6e6f64652d726573706f6e64657258207b0d47d93427f8311160781c7c733fd89f88970aef490d8aa0ee19a4cb8a1b145066666666666666666666666666666666f61a659200808201021904b0"
+  }
+}
